description_long: This is a compact, semi-automatic handgun with a robust, angular design and a two-tone color scheme featuring matte black and dark green surfaces. The slide is predominantly black with subtle panel lines and a slightly textured finish, while the frame and grip area display a deep green coloration. The grip is vertically contoured and appears to have a smooth, slightly matte surface with minimal texturing, and is secured by visible screws. The trigger guard is rounded and thick, providing ample space for finger placement, and the trigger itself is a standard curved design. The barrel is short and recessed within the slide, with a circular muzzle opening visible from the front. There are minimal visible markings or engravings on the slide, and the magazine base is flat and flush with the grip, lacking any pronounced extensions or finger rests.
description: A compact, two-tone handgun with a matte black slide and dark green grip, featuring a robust, angular design and minimal surface markings. The grip is smooth and contoured, and the magazine base is flat and flush.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black slide, green grip panels, and visible screws securing the grip; the trigger and trigger guard are clearly defined.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the width of the slide and grip, with the green coloration visible along the backstrap and minimal surface detail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same black slide and green grip, with additional screws and the slide release lever visible.
description_view_3: Front view showing the circular barrel opening, thick trigger guard, and the overall compactness of the handgun.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is vertically contoured with a smooth, matte finish and minimal surface texturing. It is secured by two visible screws on each side and features a subtle, slightly raised panel design. There are no visible finger grooves, checkering, or stippling, giving it a clean and utilitarian appearance. The grip panels are dark green, contrasting with the black frame, and lack any prominent logos or embellishments.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is thick, rounded, and generously sized, providing ample space for finger placement. It has a smooth surface with no visible undercuts, squared-off edges, or integrated accessories. The design is simple and functional, with no additional reinforcement or texturing.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and recessed within the slide, with a standard circular muzzle opening. There are no visible threads, ports, or compensators, and the exterior finish matches the matte black of the slide. No external markings or distinctive features are present on the barrel.
attribute_slide_markings: There are minimal visible markings on the slide, with only subtle panel lines and no prominent engravings, logos, or serial numbers. The surface is mostly smooth and unadorned, contributing to a clean, utilitarian look.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, lacking any extensions, flares, or finger rests. It has a simple, rectangular profile with no visible logos or texturing, maintaining a streamlined appearance.
